compiled_state.title: RED: Test ticket-graph.py archived exclusion and --include-archived
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Add tests to tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py that verify archived exclusion behavior in ticket-graph.py:
(a) build_dep_graph excludes archived tickets from children list by default
(b) build_dep_graph excludes archived blockers from blockers list by default
(c) --include-archived CLI flag returns full graph including archived
(d) compute_archive_eligible still sees all tickets (regression guard)
(e) transitive blocker traversal does NOT skip archived tickets mid-chain
(f) clear error message when deps targets archived ticket directly (exit 1, message suggests --include-archived)

**Caller audit**: Reviewed all callers of ticket-graph.py:
- ticket deps CLI (ticket script line 123) → needs --include-archived flag
- ticket link CLI (ticket script line 115) → no scan, operates on specific IDs, not affected
- ticket-graph.py --archive-eligible → explicitly uses exclude_archived=False, not affected
- Python import (build_dep_graph) → callers get new default behavior, which is the desired outcome

**Sub-step**: Review all existing test_ticket_graph.py tests and verify fixtures do not accidentally contain archived tickets that would be silently excluded by the new default.

### Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py (add test functions)
- .test-index (add RED marker)

### TDD Requirement
Write test_build_dep_graph_excludes_archived_children, test_build_dep_graph_excludes_archived_blockers, test_deps_cli_include_archived, test_compute_archive_eligible_regression, test_transitive_traversal_includes_archived_midchain, test_deps_archived_direct_target_error — all fail because archived exclusion is not yet implemented.

### Test approach
Create temporary tracker dirs with archived tickets in various positions. Invoke build_dep_graph() via Python import and CLI via subprocess. Each test function creates and tears down its own tempfile.mkdtemp() fixture.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — excluding RED-marked tests
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test test_build_dep_graph_excludes_archived_children exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_build_dep_graph_excludes_archived_children' tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py
- [ ] Test test_deps_archived_direct_target_error exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_deps_archived_direct_target_error' tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py
- [ ] Test test_transitive_traversal_includes_archived_midchain exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_transitive_traversal_includes_archived_midchain' tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py
- [ ] Test test_compute_archive_eligible_regression exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_compute_archive_eligible_regression' tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py
- [ ] .test-index RED marker entry added
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-graph.py.*test_ticket_graph.py.*test_build_dep_graph_excludes_archived' .test-index
- [ ] Each test creates its own isolated temp tracker fixture
  Verify: grep -c 'mkdtemp\|tmp_path\|tempfile' tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py, .test-index. Tests: 4 RED + 2 regression guards.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests for ticket-graph.py archived exclusion written and committed
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
